summary: Complete e2e testing of AdFlow portfolio site redesign with Ukrainian theme. All 8 tabs verified working. Frontend: Ukrainian color theme (#005BBB blue, #FFD500 gold), hero with stat cards and bio strip, navigation with gold-accented Ukraine tab. About Matt tab with narrative, 9 certs, projects, experience. Ukraine tab with Diia stats (26M+, 412, 97%), Palantir section, 3-lane partnership vision. Live Testing: warmup test executed with full results (stats row, latency chart, distribution pie, stacked bar breakdown, detailed bottleneck analysis with actionable recommendations). Test History: profile filtering (all/warmup/steady/burst/soak), like-test comparison charts working, annotation column visible. Footer links verified correct. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed including annotation PATCH endpoint.

seed_data_creation: Used existing 22 test history entries for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete frontend rewrite verified. Key data-testid attributes: home-content, test-content, architecture-content, optimizations-content, terraform-content, course-content, about-content, ukraine-content, tab-{id} for all 8 tabs, hero-run-test-btn, hero-ukraine-btn, github-link, linkedin-link, email-link, footer-email, footer-github, footer-linkedin, ukraine-cta-email, profile-{warmup/steady/burst/soak}, warmup-btn, run-test-btn, test-history-panel, toggle-history-btn, history-table, latency-stacked-bar, bottleneck-analysis, pc-status. Backend runs against real AWS with SQS, Lambda, DynamoDB. Annotation endpoint at PATCH /api/test-history/{id}/annotate. Test history now has 22+ entries with annotation field.
